_comment: Directive 02 (2026-05-25): images run on fal.ai (Vercel AI Gateway retired). Model ids verified against fal live docs. NOTE: recraft-v3 has NO seed param — carousel consistency relies on the locked style-spec prompt (the gate measures it); imagen4/ideogram honor seed. Per-model aspect handling (aspect_ratio vs image_size enum) is in packages/image/src/adapters/fal.ts.

hero.note: Photoreal/concept hero (Imagen 4 Ultra on fal). aspect_ratio + seed.

statement.note: Headline typeset into image (Ideogram v3). aspect_ratio + seed.

carousel_slide.note: Directive 04 probe (2026-05-25): recraft-v3 was DEMOTED for inventing garbled on-slide text and defaulting to photoreal stock. Carousel slides now route to Imagen4 (validated on /preview/ultra) — it honors the pinned seed (→ cross-slide consistency) and respects 'no text'. /preview is the cheaper same-family alternate; recraft kept as a fallback. aspect_ratio + seed.
